text:
Relief (, Ando) is the 306 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

As Gon's transformation nears completion, Pitou activates Terpsichora to go beyond their limits. Realizing that his power could potentially rival the King's, they charge towards Gon with the intent to kill, only for him to disappear instantly. Shocked, Pitou looks around the room for where he could have gone and sees the door behind them now open. Believing that Gon could be going after the King, they run down the hall. But blocking their path is a tall, dark figure who challenges them to fight outside the mansion, not wanting to destroy it.

It is then revealed that the figure itself is really Gon, transformed into an adult with long hair flowing endlessly. His aura flows calmly, yet ominously at the same time. As the two-step outside the mansion, Pitou has no idea what has happened, but concludes that Gon somehow forced his body to mature to the point where he could defeat them. In another desperate attempt, Pitou tries to kill him again.

However, Gon effortlessly dodges it and sends Pitou flying into the air with a kick to the stomach. He then shifts into his Jajanken stance, summoning tremendous power as Pitou plummets back down. At point-blank range, Gon strikes them in the face with a Rock, sending the Ant straight into a dense forest

As they fade into unconsciousness, Pitou is relieved, now realizing that the reason Gon became so powerful was that he was willing to give up all the Nen and potential he has to defeat them—unable to use Nen ever again after this. They rejoice at the fact that they're the one, to suffer all his rage, as Gon slowly approaches their mutilated body.
